actions.script: async function fetchSearchHTML(t,e){const r=new URLSearchParams({q:t,cc:e}),n=await fetch("https://www.bing.com/search?"+r.toString());return await n.text()}function extractTitle(t){const e=t.match(/<title>(.*?)<\/title>/i);return e?e[1].trim():""}function GetResultCount(t,e=""){const r=[".sb_count","#b_tween .sb_count",".b_pag .sb_count","#b_results .sb_count","span.sb_count"];for(const e of r){const r=t.querySelector(e);if(r){const t=r.textContent.replace(/[^\d]/g,"");if(t)return parseInt(t,10)}}if(e){const t=[/class="sb_count"[^>]*>([^<]+)</i,/>(\d[\d,\.]*?)\s+results?</i,/About\s+([\d,\.]+)\s+results?/i,/([\d,]+)\s+results?/i];for(const r of t){const t=r.exec(e);if(t&&t[1]){const e=t[1].replace(/[^\d]/g,"");if(e)return parseInt(e,10)}}}return null}function extractBingTopStories(t=document,e=1/0){const r=t.querySelectorAll("#ans_nws .na_card_wrp"),n=[];return r.forEach(((t,r)=>{if(r>=e)return;const c={},l=t.querySelector("a.na_ccw, a.nws_itm_link");c.title=l?.getAttribute("titletext")?.trim()||"N/A",c.link=l?.href||"N/A";const o=t.querySelector(".cap_title")||t.querySelector(".caption cite")||t.querySelector(".big_pub_logo cite");c.source=o?.textContent.trim()||"N/A";const i=t.querySelector(".cap_txt");c.time=i?.textContent.trim()||"N/A";const s=t.querySelector("img.rms_img");c.image=s?.src?.startsWith("//")?"https:"+s.src:s?.src||"N/A";const a=t.querySelector(".na_cal_title, .na_t_news_caption, .itm_spt");c.description=a?.textContent.trim()||"N/A",n.push(c)})),n}function extractBingOrganicResults(t=document){const e=t.querySelectorAll("li.b_algo"),r=[];return e.forEach(((t,e)=>{const n={};n.position=e+1;const c=t.querySelector("h2 > a");n.title=c?.innerText?.trim()||"N/A",n.link=c?.href||"N/A";const l=t.querySelector("cite");n.domain=l?.innerText?.trim()||(n.link?new URL(n.link).hostname:"N/A");const o=t.querySelector(".b_snippet p")||t.querySelector(".b_imgcap_altitle p.b_lineclamp3")||t.querySelector(".b_caption p");n.snippet=o?.innerText?.trim()||"N/A",r.push(n)})),r}function extractBingPagination(t=document){const e=t.querySelectorAll("ul.sb_pagF a"),r=[];return e.forEach((t=>{const e={};if(e.link=t.href||"N/A",t.classList.contains("sb_pagN"))e.type="next",e.pageNumber="Next";else{e.type="page";const r=(t.getAttribute("aria-label")||"").match(/Page (\d+)/);e.pageNumber=r?parseInt(r[1],10):"N/A"}r.push(e)})),r}function extractBingRelatedSearches(t=document){const e=t.querySelectorAll(".b_rs ul.b_vList > li"),r=[];return e.forEach(((t,e)=>{const n={},c=t.querySelector("a"),l=t.querySelector(".b_suggestionText");n.position=e+1,n.link=c?.href||"N/A",n.title=l?.innerText.trim()||"N/A",n.question=n.title,r.push(n)})),r}function extractBingRelatedQuestions(t=document){const e=t.querySelectorAll(".df_alsoAskCard"),r=[];return e.forEach(((t,e)=>{const n={};n.question=t.querySelector(".df_qntext")?.innerText.trim()||"N/A",n.answer=t.querySelector(".df_alsocon")?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";const c=t.closest("a");n.link=c?.href||"N/A",n.domain=t.querySelector(".qna_attr cite")?.innerText.trim()||"N/A",n.title=t.querySelector("h2 span")?.innerText.trim()||"N/A",n.position=e+1,r.push(n)})),r}function extractBingVideoResults(t=document){const e=t.querySelectorAll(".mc_vtvc"),r=[];return e.forEach(((t,e)=>{const n={},c=t.querySelector(".mc_vtvc_title");n.title=c?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";const l=t.querySelector(".mc_bc.items");n.duration=l?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";const o=t.querySelector(".mc_vtvc_meta_row_channel");n.channel=o?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";const i=t.querySelector("a.mc_vtvc_link");n.videoLink=i?.href||"N/A";const s=t.querySelector(".mc_vtvc_th img");n.thumbnail=s?.src||"N/A",n.position=e+1,r.push(n)})),r}function extractCastData(t=document){const e=t.querySelectorAll(".l_ecrd_car_item"),r=[];return e.forEach(((t,e)=>{const n={};n.position=e+1;const c=t.querySelector(".b_strong");n.name=c?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";const l=c?.nextElementSibling;n.character=l?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";const o=t.querySelector("img");n.image=o?.getAttribute("data-src-hq")||o?.src||"N/A",r.push(n)})),r}function extractKnowledgeGraphData(t=document){const e={type:"person",header_image:[],title:"",profile:[],website:"",timeline:[],explore_more:[],other_facts:[]},r=t.querySelector(".l_ecrd_hero img");r&&e.header_image.push({image:r.src,source:r.parentElement.href||""});const n=t.querySelector(".l_ecrd_hero_ttl h2");n&&(e.title=n.textContent.trim());t.querySelectorAll(".l_ecrd_webicons a").forEach((t=>{const r=t.title||t.querySelector("img").alt;e.profile.push({title:r,link:t.href})}));const c=t.querySelector('.l_ecrd_a1_officialsite a[href^="http"]');c&&(e.website=c.href);t.querySelectorAll(".l_ecrd_tmln_itm").forEach((t=>{const r=t.querySelector(".l_ecrd_txt_hlt")?.textContent.trim(),n=t.querySelector(".l_ecrd_txt_pln"),c=t.querySelector("a");r&&n&&e.timeline.push({year:r,text:n.textContent.trim(),link:c?.href||""})}));t.querySelectorAll("#lite-entcard_04fee_Explore ~ ul li a").forEach((t=>{const r=t.querySelector(".l_ecrd_rq_btxt")?.textContent.trim(),n=t.querySelector("img")?.src;r&&e.explore_more.push({title:r,link:t.href,thumbnail:n||""})}));return t.querySelectorAll(".l_ecrd_vqfcts_row").forEach((t=>{const r=t.querySelector(".lc_expfact_title"),n=t.querySelectorAll(".lc_expfact_default > *:not(.lc_expfact_title)");if(r){const t=r.textContent.trim(),c=[];let l="";n.forEach((t=>{"A"===t.tagName?(c.push({name:t.textContent.trim(),link:t.href}),l+=t.textContent.trim()+" "):"SPAN"===t.tagName&&(l+=t.textContent.trim()+" ")})),e.other_facts.push({name:t,original_value:l.trim(),value:c})}})),e}function LocalResults(t=document){const e=Array.from(t.querySelectorAll(".b_maglistcard, .l_maglistcard")),r=/(\+?\d[\d\s\-\(\)]{6,}\d)/;return e.map((t=>{const e=t.querySelector(".l_magTitle, h2")?.textContent?.trim()||null,n=t.querySelector(".l_magimg img.rms_img, img")?.src||null,c=t.querySelector(".l_rev_pirs")?.textContent?.trim()||null,l=t.querySelector(".l_rev_rc")?.textContent?.replace(/[()]/g,"").trim()||null,o=Array.from(t.querySelectorAll(".b_factrow, .l_magfact > div")).map((t=>t.textContent?.trim())).filter(Boolean),i=o[0]||null,s=o[1]||null,a=o[2]||null;let u=null,m=null;if(i){const t=i.split("\u00b7").map((t=>t.trim())).filter(Boolean);m=t.find((t=>/\u20b9|\$|\u00a3|\u20ac/.test(t)))||null,u=t.find((t=>!/^\d+(\.\d+)?\/\d+|\u20b9|\$|\u00a3|\u20ac/.test(t)))||null}const _=(a||"").match(r),h=_?_[0].trim():null,f=a&&a.replace(h||"","").trim()||null,p=Array.from(t.querySelectorAll("a")),g=p.find((t=>/website|web|site/i.test(t.title||t.textContent||"")))||null,y=p.find((t=>/direction|directions|maps|route/i.test(t.title||t.textContent||"")))||null;return{title:e,img:n,rating:c,reviews:l,category:u,price:m,address:s,opening:f,phone:h,website:g?g.href:null,directions:y?y.href:null,detailHref:t.querySelector('a[target="OverlayIFrame"], a[href*="/ck/"], a[href*="images/search"]')?.href||null}}))}async function processQuery(t,e){try{const r="https://www.bing.com/search?"+new URLSearchParams({q:t,cc:e}).toString(),n=await fetch(r),c=await n.text(),l=(new DOMParser).parseFromString(c,"text/html"),o={query:t,title:extractTitle(c),top_stories:extractBingTopStories(l),organic_results:extractBingOrganicResults(l),pagination:extractBingPagination(l),related_searches:extractBingRelatedSearches(l),related_questions:extractBingRelatedQuestions(l),video_results:extractBingVideoResults(l),cast_data:extractCastData(l),serp_result_count:GetResultCount(l,c),local_results:LocalResults(l)};return{success:!0,...Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(o).filter((([t,e])=>!(null==e||Array.isArray(e)&&0===e.length||"object"==typeof e&&!Array.isArray(e)&&0===Object.keys(e).length))))}}catch(e){return{success:!1,query:t,error:e.message}}} var res=await processQuery('${query}','${cc}'); return JSON.stringify(res);
